title: My Times Are Yours

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: In You I seek my refuge, Lord
Let shame not be my end
Like fortress walls and mighty towers
Your justice shall defend
My spirit fades, my bones grow weak
From all these years of grief
But still I trust Your steady hand
To grant my soul relief

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Into Your hands I place my life
My times are Yours to hold
Though storms may rage and shadows fall
Your mercy will unfold

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: My eyes are dim from endless tears
My strength has slipped away
While whispers spread like poison here
And fear fills every day
Cast out like some forgotten soul
A vessel cracked and worn
Yet in Your love I'll find my peace
When hope seems torn

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Into Your hands I place my life
My times are Yours to hold
Though storms may rage and shadows fall
Your mercy will unfold

sections.label: Bridge
lines: They plot against me in the dark
Their schemes like circling prey
But I declare: "You are my God!"
Your love lights up my way

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Let those who mock the righteous fall
Into their own deceit
While those who seek Your shelter, Lord
Find grace within defeat
Your goodness knows no earthly bounds
For those who fear Your name
In secret places You will hide
The hearts You claim

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: Into Your hands I place my life
My times are Yours to hold
Though storms may rage and shadows fall
Your mercy will unfold
Your mercy will unfold

epigraph: For my life is spent with grief
